content:
Q4. When exactly can I play free actions? Can they interrupt a main action?
Free actions can only be performed during your turn, either before, after, or even during your main action. You can interrupt a main action with a free action but you cannot interrupt a free action with another free action (you have to resolve the whole free action effect at once).

custom_metadata.title: Q4. When exactly can I play free actions? Can they interrupt a main action?
custom_metadata.locator: Q4. When exactly can I play free actions? Can they interrupt a main action?

content: Example 1: When performing a Scan action you can mark the first two signals and gain 2 data, then you can interrupt the Scan action and move those data to the first two spaces in your computer, gaining 1 publicity for covering the second space. You can then continue performing the Scan action, possibly spending that publicity you just gained to mark an extra signal in the sector with Mercury (considering you have the appropriate tech).

custom_metadata.title: Example 1: Scan action interrupted by free action
custom_metadata.locator: Example 1: When performing a Scan action

content: Example 2: You would place a data token on the fourth space in your computer, triggering the income increase effect. You might not have any cards in your hand to be tucked for income so you might want to place some more data and cover a bottom space on your computer tech that would gain you a card and use it for the income. But that is not possible because you must first fully resolve the income increase effect (as a part of the free action) before performing another free action and placing additional data.

custom_metadata.title: Example 2: Income increase free action timing
custom_metadata.locator: Example 2: You would place a data token on the fourth space

content: Free actions can only be performed during your turn.

custom_metadata.title: Free Actions During Turn Only
custom_metadata.normalized_statement: free actions can only be performed during your turn

content: A free action may interrupt a main action during your turn.

custom_metadata.title: Free Actions Can Interrupt Main Actions
custom_metadata.normalized_statement: a free action may interrupt a main action during your turn

content: A free action cannot interrupt another free action.

custom_metadata.title: Free Actions Cannot Interrupt Free Actions
custom_metadata.normalized_statement: a free action cannot interrupt another free action

content: A free action must fully resolve before another free action can begin.

custom_metadata.title: Free Action Must Resolve Before Next
custom_metadata.normalized_statement: a free action must fully resolve before another free action can begin

content: A Scan action can be interrupted by a free action and then resumed afterward.

custom_metadata.title: Scan Can Resume After Free Action Interrupt
custom_metadata.normalized_statement: a Scan action can be interrupted by a free action and then resumed afterward

content: If a free action triggers the income increase effect, that effect must fully resolve before another free action can be taken.

custom_metadata.title: Income Increase Free Action Cannot Be Nested
custom_metadata.normalized_statement: if a free action triggers the income increase effect, that effect must fully resolve before another free action can be taken

content: The player aid summarizes free actions as 'NO LIMIT'.

custom_metadata.title: Player Aid Free Actions No Limit Summary
custom_metadata.normalized_statement: the player aid summarizes free actions as no limit
